title: Swiss Open Food Facts Importer Input

maxProducts.title: Max Products
maxProducts.description: Maximum number of products to import
maxProducts.sectionDescription: Configure which products to import from Open Food Facts.

categories.title: Categories
categories.description: Filter by Open Food Facts category tags (e.g. en:dairy, en:beverages). Leave empty for all.

minCompleteness.title: Min Completeness (%)
minCompleteness.description: Minimum product completeness score (0-100). Products below this threshold are skipped.
